title: Being with Oneself as God-Encounter
author: Amalan, Arockia SJ
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
I have never used the term ‘quarantine’ till recent times, as far as I 
remember. When I first read in the newspaper, I had to turn the 
pages of my dictionary in order to have right comprehension. 
However, I learnt that it is been an ancient practice for years. In 
1377, the first law on medical isolation was passed by the Great 
Council, when the plague was rapidly running European countries. 
The law prescribed isolation for 30 days, called a ‘trentino’. 
Subsequently, many countries adopted similar laws to protect the 
people. When the duration of isolation was enhanced to 40 days, the 
name also changed to ‘quarantine’ by adopting the Latin 
‘quadraginta’, which referred to a 40-day detention placed on ships.
steps_raw:
I have never used the term ‘quarantine’ till recent times, as far as I 
remember. When I first read in the newspaper, I had to turn the 
pages of my dictionary in order to have right comprehension. 
However, I learnt that it is been an ancient practice for years. In 
1377, the first law on medical isolation was passed by the Great 
Council, when the plague was rapidly running European countries. 
The law prescribed isolation for 30 days, called a ‘trentino’. 
Subsequently, many countries adopted similar laws to protect the 
people. When the duration of isolation was enhanced to 40 days, the 
name also changed to ‘quarantine’ by adopting the Latin 
‘quadraginta’, which referred to a 40-day detention placed on ships.
